title: Mesh Networks
description: Mesh networks route data through many local peers without depending on one central ISP path. They are studied as resilience infrastructure for Bitcoin communication under outage or censorship pressure.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Broad technical reference for the wallet, transaction, and protocol ideas that support this topic.

resources.title: goTenna
resources.notes: Commercial mesh communication context often referenced in off-grid Bitcoin discussions.

resources.title: Bitcoin Developer Guide: P2P Network
resources.notes: Networking fundamentals needed before mesh-specific tradeoffs.
